function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"result": {"goal": "Add user authentication with JWT tokens to the Flask API, including a login endpoint that issues tokens and middleware that validates them on protected routes.", "context": "The project is a Python Flask API (api/app.py) with a JavaScript frontend (ui/app.js, ui/index.html). There is currently a /hello endpoint. We need to add POST /auth/login that accepts username and password and returns a signed JWT, plus a decorator that validates the token on protected routes. SOPs require all API endpoints to have corresponding tests.", "scope": {"include": ["api/app.py", "api/auth.py", "ui/app.js"], "exclude": ["node_modules", ".git", ".semspec"], "do_not_touch": ["api/requirements.txt", "README.md"]}}}
